summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of The Gig Pulse PWA. All requested features are working excellently with proper image loading. Featured products, Community Favorites, Weekly Shows, and Gig Apps all displaying correctly with working images.
passed_tests: Essentials page: 3 Featured products with images (REDTIGER F37 4K Dash Cam, Fanttik Slim V8 APEX Car Vacuum, iOttie Easy One Touch Signature)
Essentials page: Community Favorites section with 19+ items showing Pexels images
News page: 3 Weekly Shows with thumbnails (Drivers Coast 2 Coast X Space, Show Me The Money Club, Off The Clock)
Apps page: 10 Gig Apps displayed in grid (Uber, Uber Eats, Lyft, DoorDash, Grubhub, Instacart, Spark, Amazon Flex, Shipt, Roadie)
Apps page: Helpful Tools section present
All 23 images loading correctly (100% success rate)
Pexels image URLs working properly for Community Favorites
Proper branding and layout on all pages
